claims.summary: Treat 12D as an additive distillation companion to the canonical 48D lane, never as silent replacement transport.
Preserve warmth and tail texture in explicit glimpse slots and pair the glimpse with residual context.
Keep deterministic mapping and continuity/checkpoint lineage inspectable across restart-oriented review.
Gate any live 12D transport, replacement contract, ABI, or Minime consumption change as Tier 5.
